title: Loki’s Chains and the Island’s Fear
description: On pages 5–7, this part follows Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Dorry, Unknown person #6, Children as God’s Knights and Elbaf’s ruling tensions push the island toward open conflict while the Straw Hats and giants react to the threat.
scene: God’s Knights and Elbaf’s ruling tensions push the island toward open conflict while the Straw Hats and giants react to the threat.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The kids may appear to just be waddling along in broad daylight...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But it seems impossible for anyone to stop them.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The intruders have set up some sort of twisted game...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ...with their three abilities.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We'll save those kids no matter what!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Seems like the quickest solution is to target the three ability users.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if they're as immortal as they claim, there should be a way to take them down.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We could try trapping them... or crushing them... maybe even eating them!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's the Sun Realm!! Prepare to disembark!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Ha ha... sounds promising. Let's do this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: WHOTOR!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: This is beyond anything I imagined!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are there not limits to these nightmare monsters?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Look at that!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Is that the great eirk?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Dorry and Brogy were aboard it earlier, leading the charge with their crew...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But they were shot down by those monsters!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That can't be!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Is that you, Rajrudin?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Kashi-SAN!! I'm glad you're okay!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was in the realm of the dead!! Tell me what's going on!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You won't believe this!! Listen closely...

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Dorry and Brogy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ...Are trying to kill Elder Jarul?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They all went crazy!! Please, you've got to stop them!!

dialogue.speaker: Children
dialogue.text: Kashi-San, how about the children?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ripley and the others went after them, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've had no word on their status. The kids may have already reached the harbor by now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hey, Rodo!! Listen...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: WHA-?!

summary: This part advances God’s Knights Tighten Their Grip through 30 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
